title: alyssum lanuginosum
intro: Alyssum lanuginosum, also known as woolly alyssum, is a perennial plant species in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its small white flowers and woolly leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alyssum lanuginosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep. Alyssum lanuginosum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
